traits.locale_text:
If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his turn, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.
While Eogunn suffers from {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, half of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed at the end of his turn instead.
If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his turn, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.
While Eogunn is suffering from {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}neurogenic shock{/g}, half of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed at the end of his turn instead.

languages.text: Если Эоганн не использовал {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Экстракцию витального компонента{/g} в свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, в конце хода он сам становится ее целью.
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
Если Эоганн не использовал {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Экстракцию витального компонента{/g} в свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, в конце хода он сам становится ее целью.
Пока на Эоганна наложен {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}нейрогенный шок{/g}, в конце его хода вместо этого снимается половина уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.

Если Эоганн не использовал {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Экстракцию витального компонента{/g} в свой {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}, в конце хода он сам становится ее целью.
Пока на Эоганна наложен {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}нейрогенный шок{/g}, в конце его хода вместо этого снимается половина уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.

languages.text: Hat Eogunn {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vitalkomponenten-Extraktion{/g} während seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} nicht eingesetzt, belegt er sich am Ende des Zuges selbst damit.
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
Hat Eogunn {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vitalkomponenten-Extraktion{/g} während seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} nicht eingesetzt, belegt er sich am Ende des Zuges selbst damit.
Ist Eogunn mit {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}Neurogener Schock{/g} belegt, wird die Hälfte seiner {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}-Stapel am Ende seines nächsten Zuges entfernt.

languages.text: Si Eogunn no ha usado {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extracción de componente vital{/g} durante su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, lo utiliza consigo mismo como objetivo al final del turno.
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
Si Eogunn no ha usado {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extracción de componente vital{/g} durante su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, lo utiliza consigo mismo como objetivo al final del turno.
Mientras Eogunn padece {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}conmoción neurogénica{/g}, en lugar de esto, pierde la mitad de acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.

languages.text: 若伊奥贡在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内未使用{g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}关键构件萃取{/g}，他将在回合结束时以自身为目标施放该技能。
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
若伊奥贡在其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}内未使用{g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}关键构件萃取{/g}，他将在回合结束时以自身为目标施放该技能。
当伊奥贡处于{g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}神经性休克{/g}状态，改为在其回合结束时移除一半{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}层数。

languages.text: Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} esnasında {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Hayati Bileşen Çıkarımı{/g} kullanmazsa turun sonunda bu kabiliyeti kendisini hedef alarak kullanır.
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} esnasında {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Hayati Bileşen Çıkarımı{/g} kullanmazsa turun sonunda bu kabiliyeti kendisini hedef alarak kullanır.
Eogunn, {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}nörojenik şok{/g} etkisinden muzdaripse bunun yerine turunun sonunda {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikiminin yarısı ortadan kalkar.

languages.text: Si Eogunn n'a pas utilisé {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extraction de composant vital{/g} pendant son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il utilise la capacité en se ciblant lui-même à la fin de son tour.
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
Si Eogunn n'a pas utilisé {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extraction de composant vital{/g} pendant son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, il utilise la capacité en se ciblant lui-même à la fin de son tour.
S'il souffre de {g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}Choc neurogénique{/g}, la moitié des cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g} sont à la place supprimés à la fin de son tour.

languages.text:
エオガンが{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中に{g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}重要部品の摘出{/g}を使用しなかった場合、彼はターン終了時に自分自身を対象としてそれを使用する。
エオガンが{g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}神経原性ショック{/g}を受けている間は、代わりにターン終了時に{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}のスタックの半分が除去される。
languages.original_text: If Eogunn has not used {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} during his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he uses it targeting himself at the end of the turn.

traits.locale_text:
エオガンが{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}中に{g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}重要部品の摘出{/g}を使用しなかった場合、彼はターン終了時に自分自身を対象としてそれを使用する。
エオガンが{g|f:30b20c0ee9b94aa09af18293c6e1222e}神経原性ショック{/g}を受けている間は、代わりにターン終了時に{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}のスタックの半分が除去される。
